assignments.name: Approved_Create_Reconfiguration_Change_Log_Net_Amount
assignments.label: Approved - Create Reconfiguration Change Log - Net Amount

assignments.name: Approved_Create_Reconfiguration_Change_Log_Unit_Discount
assignments.label: Approved - Create Reconfiguration Change Log - Unit Discount %

assignments.name: Base_Unit_Quantity_Create_Reconfiguration_Change_Log
assignments.label: Base Unit Quantity - Create Reconfiguration Change Log

assignments.name: Cloned_a_Unit_Create_Reconfiguration_Change_Log
assignments.label: Cloned a Unit - Create Reconfiguration Change Log

assignments.name: Create_Reconfiguration_Change_Log_Net_Amount
assignments.label: Create Reconfiguration Change Log - Net Amount

assignments.name: Create_Reconfiguration_Change_Log_Unit_Discount
assignments.label: Create Reconfiguration Change Log - Unit Discount %

assignments.name: Off_Unit_Added_Create_Reconfiguration_Change_Log
assignments.label: Off Unit Added - Create Reconfiguration Change Log

assignments.name: Off_Unit_Removed_Create_Reconfiguration_Change_Log
assignments.label: Off Unit Removed - Create Reconfiguration Change Log

assignments.name: On_Unit_Added_Create_Reconfiguration_Change_Log
assignments.label: On Unit Added - Create Reconfiguration Change Log

assignments.name: On_Unit_Removed_Create_Reconfiguration_Change_Log
assignments.label: On Unit Removed - Create Reconfiguration Change Log

assignments.name: Set_Status_to_No_Approval_Required
assignments.label: Set Status to No Approval Required

rules.name: Create_Change_Log_Reconfiguration_Type_Pending_Approval
rules.label: Create Change Log - Reconfiguration Type (Pending Approval)

rules.name: Create_Change_Log_Reconfiguration_Type_Quantity_Changed
rules.label: Create Change Log - Reconfiguration Type (Quantity Changed)

decisions.name: Quote_is_Approved_but_not_ordered
decisions.label: Quote is Approved but not ordered

rules.name: Net_changed_after_approval
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 11) OR (4 AND 3 AND 5 AND 11) OR (6 AND 7 AND 8 AND 11) OR (1 AND 2 AND (5 OR 10) AND 9 AND 11)
rules.label: Net changed after approval

rules.name: ready_for_Task
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7) OR (1 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7)
rules.label: ready for task

rules.name: ready_for_BluEdge_task
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7) OR (1 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7)
rules.label: ready for BluEdge task

Flow.description: For actions that happen after save - adjusted so the product number closes the oppty

formulas.description: calculates the reminder for the csr task
formulas.name: ReminderDate

formulas.description: used in the task that gets created for the CSR
formulas.name: Subject_For_CSR_Task
formulas.expression: TEXT({!$Record.NATT_Product_Family__c})&" - Add a Product Number and/or Paint Code to Quote"

Flow.interviewLabel: NATT Quote After Save Update V2 {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: NATT Quote After Save Update V2

recordLookups.description: looks up the BluEdge Queue Id
recordLookups.name: Get_BluEdge_Queue_Id
recordLookups.label: Get BluEdge Queue Id

recordLookups.description: looks up the CSR Queue Id
recordLookups.name: Get_CSR_Queue_Id
recordLookups.label: Get CSR Queue Id

variables.description: checked if a record update is needed - evaluated at the end of flow
variables.name: boolRecordUpdateNeeded
